view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opened status is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opened status is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic as specified in the use case. The evidence shows that there is a condition step defined as 'if_opened' which checks for the event 'opened' and directs the flow accordingly to either 'send_offer' or 'send_reminder'. This directly aligns with the requirement of executing different actions based on whether the email was opened or not, confirming that the requirement is fully covered.
